subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison. Verily, there is none other God but He, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Thou hast attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی اسمعی ندائی من شطر سجنی انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم انک اذا فزت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
